parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Project
class User
class Submission
class Admin
class Author
class Revision
class Editor
class Resource
class Comment
class Document
class AudioFile
class Video

Project "1" o-- "*" User
Project "1" *-- "*" Submission
Project "1" *-- "*" Resource

User <|-- Admin
User <|-- Editor
User <|-- Author

Submission "1" o--> "1" Author
Submission "1" *-- "*" Comment
Submission "1" *-- "*" Revision
Submission "1" *-- "*" Resource

Revision "1" o--> "1" Editor
Revision "1" o--> "1" Resource

Author "1" --> "*" Comment
Editor "1" --> "*" Comment

Resource <|-- Document
Resource <|-- AudioFile
Resource <|-- Video
@enduml
```
